q(ExE,θ) = x1^2 + 4*x2^2 + 4*x2*x5 + 4*x3^2 - 4*x3*x4 + 180*x4^2 + 180*x5^2
deg(ExE,θ) = x1^2 + x1*x4 + x2^2 - x2*x3 + 45*x3^2 + 45*x4^2
